name: Aeliana

sheet.name: Aeliana
sheet.background_story: In the expansive Southern Plains, Aeliana, a skilled warrior and devoted follower of Yorn, inadvertently trespassed upon sacred Druidic grounds. Enraged by her intrusion, the Druids cursed Aeliana to become a woodland automaton. Her once agile form transformed into gnarling roots, and her entire face became an eerie stone mask, reflecting her unwavering loyalty to Yorn. Now, she roams the open plains as a silent guardian, blending her warrior skills with the mystical essence of the cursed automaton.

description: In the expansive Southern Plains, Aeliana, a skilled warrior and devoted follower of Yorn, inadvertently trespassed upon sacred Druidic grounds. Enraged by her intrusion, the Druids cursed Aeliana to become a woodland automaton. Her once agile form transformed into gnarling roots, and her entire face became an eerie stone mask, reflecting her unwavering loyalty to Yorn. Now, she roams the open plains as a silent guardian, blending her warrior skills with the mystical essence of the cursed automaton.
